goal: Build a categorical lighting randomizer over 4 named orchard conditions (overcast, direct sun, golden hour, dappled).
thoughts: Categorical sampling over 4 physically meaningful conditions is much better than uniform noise — uniform produces nonsensical midnight-with-direct-sun frames. Each condition = (HDRI swap, sun azimuth/elevation range, intensity range). Use rep.distribution.choice over 4 named conditions, then nested uniforms inside. Real API only — no rep.presets.outdoor_lighting(). 12 real HDRIs can be bucketed into the 4 categories.
code:
# 1. Define the 4 categorical conditions with concrete ranges
CONDITIONS = {
    "overcast_midday":  {"hdri": "<HDRI_OVERCAST>", "sun_el": [80,90],  "sun_az": [0,360], "sun_i": [1000, 2000]},
    "direct_sun":       {"hdri": "<HDRI_CLEAR>",    "sun_el": [55,75],  "sun_az": [90,270],"sun_i": [5000,8000]},
    "golden_hour":      {"hdri": "<HDRI_GOLDEN>",   "sun_el": [5,15],   "sun_az": [80,100],"sun_i": [2000,4000]},
    "dappled_through_leaves": {"hdri": "<HDRI_FOREST>","sun_el": [40,60],"sun_az": [0,360],"sun_i": [3000,6000]},
}

# 2. Author the categorical sampler stage
configure_sdg(
    stage="lighting",
    sampler="categorical",
    categories=list(CONDITIONS.keys()),
    weights=[0.25, 0.35, 0.2, 0.2],   # realistic orchard day mix
    per_category_params=CONDITIONS,
)

# 3. Register with the main pipeline
create_sdg_pipeline(
    name="apples_lighting_dr",
    randomizers=["lighting_categorical", "camera_pose"],
    num_frames=<N_FRAMES>,
)

# 4. Preview one frame per category to sanity check
preview_sdg(pipeline="apples_lighting_dr", frame_count=4, force_categories=list(CONDITIONS.keys()))
failure_modes: assistant uses single rep.randomizer.light() with uniform noise
